case_title: WILLIAM ANDREW WILSON VS. JEFF G ENTERPRISES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, WILLIAM ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT JEFF G ENTERPRISES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, WILLIAM ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFF G ENTERPRISES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,950.29 PRINCIPAL, $81.96 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,237.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
